name: Kouzuki Momonosuke (Reprint)
effect_text: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[On Play] Add up to 1 of your "Land of Wano" type Characters other than [Kouzuki Momonosuke] to the top or bottom of the owner's Life cards face-up.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
